task: M3 milestone — Warp minimal terminal/session integration per .omc/plans/ralplan-warp-on-mobile.md §6 M3 (Layer 2b via warp_terminal_mobile_facade D1.5-hybrid). Wire M1 PTY stream → M2 renderer via warp_terminal + facade. 8-12 weeks.

in: warp_terminal_mobile_facade real impl (Session::spawn/write/read API + AppContext/FeatureFlag mobile shims + SSH no-op provider)
cfg-gate app::terminal::* desktop-only paths at app crate edges (target <500 lines per Pre-mortem C threshold)
Facade output → warpui::platform::android::Window::push_frame wiring (PTY bytes → terminal model → renderer)
DCS hook parser implementation (ESC P $ d ... 0x9c) for Block boundary detection
Bootstrap zsh_body.sh DCS hook ship + integration into APK assets
Block model: start_time + command + exit_code populated correctly (M3 Acceptance #3)
Live ls -la /system test on S24 Ultra: colored output + line-wrapped (M3 Acceptance #1)
Scrollback ≥1000 lines + 60fps touch-drag scroll (M3 Acceptance #2 — flagship pathway)
APK size budget: release ≤80MB (excluding bootstrap zip), ≤120MB combined (M3 Acceptance #4)
Cherry-pick dry-run from warpdotdev/Warp@HEAD onto mobile/main; record per-crate conflict count + time (M3 Acceptance #5)
M3 close-out integration document per M2-go-no-go.md template
out: Mobile UX polish — selection / accessory row / block gestures (M5)
AI integration Haiku ghost-text + Sonnet agent (M6)
M2-S13 Pixel 4a/A52s low-end re-run (USER CHOICE — deferred indefinitely per 「先跳過便宜手機」 directive 2026-04-30)
Mid-tier S21+ device verification (deferred to post-M3 polish; flagship-only for M3)
Warp Drive / Warp Cloud sync (proprietary; v3+)

stories.title: M3 kickoff doc + Plan section update + M2-S13 deferral note
acceptanceCriteria: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-kickoff-confirmed.md exists per M2-kickoff-confirmed.md template documenting M3 Layer 2b integration scope, 5 ralplan §6 M3 acceptance criteria with quantified gates, entry criteria satisfied (M2 closed CONDITIONAL GO at 0506c35; warpui::platform::android backend ready; PTY plumbing from M1 ready)
Lists 12 M3 stories with Phase assignment (Foundation S02-S04 / DCS+Block S05-S07 / Acceptance S08-S10 / Carry-overs S11 / Close-out S12)
Documents M2-S13 user-deferred status (per 「先跳過便宜手機」 2026-04-30) — flagship-only verification path for M3, low-end remains M3 carry-over option (no longer P0 blocker)
Death-pit awareness: Pre-mortem C cfg-gate budget (>500 lines = scope concern); Pre-mortem cherry-pick velocity (app/ conflicts >2hr = scope concern)
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: warp_terminal_mobile_facade real impl (Session API + AppContext + FeatureFlag + SSH-noop)
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/crates/warp_terminal_mobile_facade/Cargo.toml has real deps (was M0 placeholder); cdylib not required (rlib for app/ to consume)
src/lib.rs exposes Session::spawn(cmd: &str, env: &[(&str,&str)]) -> Session, Session::write(&[u8]), Session::read(&mut [u8]) -> Result<usize>
src/app_context.rs: AppContext mobile shim — minimal subset of warp app::AppContext satisfying warp_terminal needs (no AI, no SSH, no feature_flag dispatch)
src/feature_flag.rs: FeatureFlag mobile shim — returns hardcoded values (terminal_enabled=true, ai_enabled=false, blocks_enabled=true)
src/ssh_noop.rs: SSH provider that returns Unsupported on all calls (mobile doesn't ship SSH in v1)
Build verification: cargo doc --no-deps -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade succeeds; cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a check -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade succeeds; ≥1 unit test stubs all desktop deps
Cargo.lock unchanged for warp_terminal/warpui deps (no upstream edge churn)
Web search docs cited (warp upstream AppContext/FeatureFlag patterns; mobile shim precedents)
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Extract app::terminal::model::* into facade modules (Plan Amendment 5; replaces cfg-gate approach)
stories.verifiedBy: codex round-1 PASS @ c76f876 (warp-src) + Amendment 5 reframe
acceptanceCriteria: Per Plan Amendment 5: original cfg-gate-app/ approach REPLACED with extraction. app/ stays out of Android build graph.

warp_terminal_mobile_facade adds new app_terminal::* module tree containing extracted Block, BlockList, ANSI parser (incl dcs_hooks), and minimal Session glue from app/src/terminal/model/* — NOT a re-export, but a copy-and-adapt to compile standalone for Android

Use cfg(target_os = "android") only where the extracted code itself needs platform-specific handling (e.g. PTY traits) — most extracted code should be platform-neutral and compile cleanly under cargo ndk check
Web search docs cited (Cargo workspace member crates with copied source; legal/license note that AGPL allows copying within same workspace under same license)

Verification: `cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a check -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade` passes; `cargo test -p warp_terminal_mobile_facade` passes including ≥3 new tests for extracted Block/BlockList/DCS parsing; Cargo.lock unchanged for warp_terminal/warpui edges
Pre-mortem C escape hatch: if extraction completeness blocks (extracted module pulls in another module that pulls in app/ orchestrator), STOP and report; lead may amend extraction boundary
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Facade → warpui Android push_frame wiring (PTY bytes → terminal model → renderer)
stories.verifiedBy: codex round-1 PASS @ warp-src 71f5c73 + main c6574f3
acceptanceCriteria: warp_terminal_mobile_facade/src/render.rs implements adapter: PTY bytes (via M1 PTY backend) → warp_terminal model (cells/lines/cursor) → warpui::platform::android::Window::push_frame
Java side: WarpTerminalService.kt (M1) wires read coroutine → JNI inputBytes(buf) → facade::Session::read_into_model() → triggers Choreographer redraw flag
Rust side: facade exposes Java_dev_warp_mobile_NativeBridge_terminalInputBytes JNI export consuming PTY output; calls into warp_terminal model + push_frame
Renderer integration: extend M2-S08 static_grid.rs path to consume terminal model cells (color attributes + line-wrapped text), or branch to a new dynamic_grid.rs path
Verification: `cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a build -p warp-mobile-android-host` + `cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleDebug` succeed; APK installs and launches without crash
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: DCS hook parser implementation (ESC P $ d ... 0x9c)
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/crates/warp_terminal/src/dcs.rs (or wherever upstream parses DCS — verify file path via M0 archeology re-check) implements DCS sequence parser for ESC P $ d <payload> ST (where ST = 0x9c or ESC \)
Parser extracts payload bytes between ESC P $ d and ST; payload format: warp-specific (likely JSON-ish or key=value; verify upstream warp protocol)
Unit tests: feed synthetic DCS sequences (start, end, malformed) into parser; verify state machine transitions correctly
Web search docs cited (DCS sequence spec ECMA-48 §5.6 / xterm DCS / warp upstream DCS hook format)
cargo ndk -t arm64-v8a check -p warp_terminal succeeds; if any android-incompat errors, scope as additional cfg-gate work
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Bootstrap zsh_body.sh DCS hook ship + APK asset integration
acceptanceCriteria: warp-src/app/assets/bundled/bootstrap/zsh_body.sh updated with warp DCS hook (precmd hook emits start_time/command boundary; preexec hook emits exit_code) — verify upstream warp pattern via M0 archeology
android/app/src/main/assets/zsh_body.sh shipped via Gradle copy task or asset pack (similar to M2-S02 jniLibs Gradle pattern)
M1 PTY spawn path can source the DCS hook: bash -c 'export ZDOTDIR=...; zsh' or similar — verify via test-pty-reattach.sh extension
Verification: APK packaged with zsh_body.sh asset; PTY spawn loads hook; `whoami` produces DCS sequences in PTY output (logcat grep for ESC P $ d)
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Block model — start_time / command / exit_code (M3 Acceptance #3)
acceptanceCriteria: warp_terminal model side: Block struct with fields {start_time: SystemTime, command: String, exit_code: Option<i32>, output_range: Range<usize>} — verify upstream warp_terminal Block struct
DCS parser (S05) emits BlockEvent::Start(start_time, command) on precmd hook + BlockEvent::End(exit_code) on preexec hook
Block aggregation: terminal model maintains Vec<Block>; on Start emits new block; on End updates current block exit_code + finalizes

Verification (acceptance #3): run 3 sample commands in zsh on the device (`ls`, `whoami`, `false`); inspect Block model state via JNI debug accessor (e.g., NativeBridge.terminalBlocksDump()) — assert 3 Block entries with correct start_time + command + exit_code (0/0/1)
Driver: tools/scripts/test-block-model.sh <serial> drives the test; result.json with block_count, command_match[], exit_code_match[], gate.overall_pass
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Live ls -la /system colored + line-wrapped on S24 Ultra (M3 Acceptance #1)
acceptanceCriteria: End-to-end PTY → terminal model → renderer pipeline produces correctly colored + line-wrapped output for `ls -la /system` (Android system dir, ~50-100 lines)
Color attributes: ANSI 16-color baseline; ls --color=auto must produce blue dirs / green executables (compare vs Linux baseline screenshot)
Line wrap: 80-col terminal default; long filenames wrap at column boundary OR continue per stty/COLUMNS env

Driver: tools/scripts/test-ls-la.sh R5CX10VFFBA — install APK, spawn PTY shell, send `ls -la /system\n`, capture frame via M2-S05 capture, pull PNG, run pixel diff against `M3-S08-golden.png` (≥95% similarity)
Result artifact: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-S08-result.json with line_count, color_attribute_count_per_color, golden_diff_percentage, gate.overall_pass
Honest disclosure: any color/wrap deviation from Linux baseline documented
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Scrollback ≥1000 lines + 60fps touch-drag scroll (M3 Acceptance #2 flagship)
acceptanceCriteria: warp_terminal model maintains ring buffer ≥1000 lines of scrollback; old lines evicted when buffer full
Touch-drag scroll: M2-S11 GestureDetector onScroll → terminal model viewport offset adjustment → renderer redraws with new offset
Two-finger flick: GestureDetector.onFling → momentum scroll with VelocityTracker (M2-S11 sign convention: positive vy = finger down)
60fps verification on Galaxy S24 Ultra R5CX10VFFBA: scroll for 5 seconds via tools/scripts/test-scroll.sh, p95 frame interval <16.6ms during scroll
Result artifact: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-S09-result.json with scrollback_max_lines, scroll_p50/p95/p99_ms, peak_fps, gate.overall_pass
S21+ verification optional (RFCNC0WNT9H online); low-end Pixel 4a/A52s deferred per M2-S13 user choice
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: APK size budget — release ≤80MB / combined ≤120MB (M3 Acceptance #4)
acceptanceCriteria: Release APK (excluding bootstrap zip) ≤80MB: `cd android && ./gradlew :app:assembleRelease` produces app-release-unsigned.apk; `du -h` ≤80MB
Combined (release APK + bootstrap zsh_body.sh + any other M4-precursor assets) ≤120MB
If over budget: surface largest contributors via `unzip -l app-release.apk | sort -k1 -n -r | head -20`; document trade-offs (e.g., strip debug info, drop unused features, defer to M5 polish)
Validation layer .so excluded from release (already gitignored per M2-S04 round-3); only debug variant ships it
Result artifact: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-S10-result.json with apk_release_bytes, apk_release_with_bootstrap_bytes, top_10_contributors, gate.overall_pass
Codex review dispatched and PASS verdict received

stories.title: Cross-workspace dup unification + cherry-pick dry-run (M3 Acceptance #5 + M2 carry-overs)
acceptanceCriteria: M2 carry-over cleanup: unify the 4 cross-workspace duplicates (font_render.rs main↔warp-src/font.rs; static_grid.rs both copies; ime.rs both copies; input.rs both copies) — option A=main consumes warp-src via Cargo.toml path dep; option B=warp-src is the only copy + main repo deletes its mirror; document decision rationale

Cherry-pick dry-run from warpdotdev/Warp@HEAD onto warp-mobile/main (or warp-mobile/m0-facade): `git fetch upstream main && git cherry-pick upstream/main~10..upstream/main` — record total time + per-crate conflict count for warp_terminal/ (expected low) vs app/ (expected high)
If app/ conflicts take >2hr to resolve: trip Pre-mortem C #4 budget; surface as scope concern + propose facade widening
Result artifact: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-S11-result.json with cherry_pick_total_time_min, conflict_count_per_crate, conflict_resolution_strategy, gate.overall_pass

Other M2 carry-overs absorbed: stale handle-ime-keyboard-visibility doc URL fix; WindowInsetsControllerCompat.show(Type.ime()) for ime_mode test hook; START_STATIC_GRID broadcast receiver impl OR comment removal; SubpixelMask emoji smoke test; test-pty-reattach.sh hardcoded /Users/iml1s/.../adb path fix

stories.title: M3 close-out integration document
acceptanceCriteria: .omc/m3-artifacts/M3-go-no-go.md exists per M2-go-no-go.md template
§1 Story Ledger: all 12 M3 stories with PASS/PARTIAL/FAIL + commit hash + evidence file:line
§2 Architecture state at M3 close: warp_terminal_mobile_facade real-impl module structure; cfg-gate count after S03; Block model + DCS parser file:line refs
§3 Per-layer GO/CONDITIONAL/NO-GO: L2 facade primary; L1 warpui Android renderer integrated; L0 PTY/FGS unchanged
§4 Performance baselines: ls -la /system color/wrap accuracy (S08); scrollback p95 frame time during scroll (S09); APK size (S10); cherry-pick conflict count (S11)
§5 M4 Carry-overs: Termux bootstrap real impl; pkg/apt UX; bootstrap zip reproducibility; F-Droid metadata
§6 Final verdict GO / CONDITIONAL GO / NO-GO with rationale (likely CONDITIONAL on user-deferred S13 + S21+ mid-tier verification deferral, mirrors M2 pattern)
§7 Per-criterion citation table covering all ralplan §6 M3 ACs with file:line refs
§8 SOP lessons learned (M2-S11 pattern: lead-dispatched codex AFTER fix is the only valid path to passes:true; worker self-PASS is invalid)
Codex 5-round iterative review SOP per M2-S14 — final round PASS

verifierConfig.rationale: User SOP from M0/M1/M2: every worker deliverable goes through Codex review. M2-S11 process violation lesson (worker self-PASS exposed by lead audit) makes lead-dispatched codex AFTER fix the canonical pattern for M3+. Web doc lookup precedes implementation per 「搭配 codex 和網路搜索相關文檔和資訊」.
